summary: Frontend-only verification of the new Gastromek CRM redesigns on https://crm-quote-hub.preview.emergentagent.com (admin@arigastro.com). ALL 9 requested checks PASS: (1) Quotes page renders status-summary chip strip (quote-chip-all + quote-chip-taslak/gonderildi/kabul/red/suresi_doldu) with counts (Alle 4 / Entwurf 0 / Gesendet 0 / Angenommen 1 / Abgelehnt 0 / Abgelaufen 3) — clicking quote-chip-taslak filters 4->0 rows, quote-chip-all restores; document-style row list has left status accent stripe (verified inline style 'background-color: rgb(112,200,0)' on the brand-green absolute span) + green mono GM-/AR- quote-no chip + amount; quote-link-<id> rows clickable; search/filters/date inputs present. (2) Quote code prefix GM- CONFIRMED — newly created quote got 'GM-202606-0001' (cleaned up after test). (3) Product features editor: add-feature-btn appears on the line item; clicking it adds item-feature-input-0/1; filled 'Edelstahl 304' + '230V / 50Hz'; remove-feature-1 removes the second line; saved the quote; PDF preview DOM (#quote-pdf-root) contains the kept feature 'Edelstahl 304' but NOT the removed '230V / 50Hz' — empty/removed features are correctly ignored; backend persisted features=['Edelstahl 304'] only. (4) Quote form redesign verified: three numbered step sections (1 Kunde, 2 Angebotspositionen, 3 Angebotsnotizen) with circular number badges, plus dark sticky summary box quote-totals (Angebotspositionen count + Zwischensumme + Gesamtbetrag) — full create flow works end-to-end. (5) Customers page: customers-list with two-line rows, hover stripe, chevron; header shows total count badge '3'; customer-link-<id> rows visible; search/filters/clear/pagination still wired. (6) Customer Detail: opens with profile hero, clickable contact chips verified (a[href^=tel:], a[href^=mailto:], a[href*=wa.me] all present); save-customer-detail-btn + back-to-customers present. (7) Quote View document workspace: quote-meta sidebar visible; toolbar buttons all present and counted: download-pdf-btn, quote-status-change, edit-quote-btn, email-btn, whatsapp-btn. (8) Settings/Company tab populated with Gastromek data: company_name 'Gastromek GmbH', email 'info@gastromek.de', phone '+49 163 9830039', address 'Hörderstr. 288, 58454 Witten', and logo URL (gastromek-logo.png from customer-assets). (9) Language: DE is default; language-switcher-btn -> language-option-tr toggles to Turkish: add-feature-btn text 'Eigenschaft hinzufügen' (DE) <-> 'Özellik ekle' (TR) confirmed; switching back to DE clean; regex scan returned zero raw translation keys. Zero pageerrors during the entire run.
action_items: (carry-over polish, optional) suppress pre-login /api/auth/me 401 noise on /login route.
(carry-over polish, optional) login redirect lands on '/' instead of '/dashboard' — both work, but a redirect to /dashboard would match the wait_for_url('**/dashboard**') idiom in automated tests.
critical_code_review_comments: QuoteForm.jsx ItemRow.features: trims and filters Boolean before submit (line 166) and PDF template filters again (QuotePDFTemplate.jsx:141) — defense in depth for empty feature lines, good.
Quotes.jsx row stripe color is driven by status via inline style (rgb(112,200,0) for accepted) — works in jsdom/CSS-disabled environments and html2canvas; correct choice.
Customers list avatars are initials-divs (no ) — matches the contact-style spec; previous assumption of /[class*=avatar] was wrong on the testing side, not a bug.
Backend GM- prefix correctly emitted by generate_quote_no (routes/quotes.py:50). Cleanup endpoint DELETE /api/quotes/<id> still returns 200.
Settings Company tab still uses one global Save handler; minor scoped-save improvement noted in iteration_4 still applies (not a bug).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (9/9 requested redesign checks + GM- prefix + features editor + PDF reflection)

seed_data_creation: Created 1 test quote via UI (GM-202606-0001, customer 'Esra Butik', single custom item with feature 'Edelstahl 304'). DELETED via DELETE /api/quotes/191bfed5-00f6-412b-ac1d-feef656bc8cd -> 200. DB state restored (Quotes back to 4 rows).
context_for_next_testing_agent:
All redesign features verified. Gotchas: (1) After save-quote-btn, page.wait_for_url('**/teklifler/**') matches even on /teklifler/yeni — read window.location.pathname AFTER wait_for_selector('[data-testid=quote-view]') to get the real new quote id, or just look up the quote_no via GET /api/quotes. (2) Customer avatars are styled
initials, not . (3) Quote row left stripe color is inline style rgb(112,200,0); other statuses use orange/red/amber inline styles — assert via element.style.backgroundColor, not Tailwind class names. (4) localStorage keys: gastromek_lang (de|tr) and gastromek_token. (5) Currency stays ₺ regardless of UI language (by design). (6) Cleanup DELETE works: fetch('/api/quotes/', {method:'DELETE', headers:{Authorization:'Bearer '+localStorage.gastromek_token}}). (7) The new GM- counter is per YYYYMM (GM-202606-0001 in June 2026).
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All four user requests delivered correctly: (a) Quotes/Customers/CustomerDetail/Quotes/QuoteView/QuoteForm visual redesigns are live (chip strip, document rows, contact-style list, profile hero, document workspace with meta sidebar, numbered step badges + dark totals box); (b) quote_no prefix flipped from AR- to GM- in routes/quotes.py generate_quote_no and verified by creating a quote and reading 'GM-202606-0001'; (c) per-item features editor works end-to-end — add/remove/save and only the kept non-empty entries appear as green bullets under the product in the PDF preview DOM (#quote-pdf-root) and persist on the QuoteItem.features list; (d) Settings/Company tab now ships Gastromek GmbH defaults (name, email info@gastromek.de, phone +49 163 9830039, address Hörderstr. 288 / 58454 Witten, plus logo). Nothing to mitigate.
